positive: A whimsical, stylized, and highly detailed illustration of a glowing, bioluminescent mountain range nestled within a deep forest valley. The main focus is a stylized, ethereal fox sitting on a rock overlooking the valley, observing a gentle nebula-filled sky. Use a vibrant, neon-pop color palette dominated by teal, magenta, gold, and deep indigo. The style should be a blend of vintage botanical engraving and modern kawaii aesthetics, rendered with crisp, thick outlines and high contrast for maximum print visibility. Composition should be centered and symmetrical, emphasizing strong silhouettes and clean, stylized graphic elements suitable for apparel printing. Overhead light source creating dramatic rim lighting on the fox and surrounding foliage. Perfect for a t-shirt graphic.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, noisy, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, ugly, grain, jpeg artifacts
